title: Lice's ID Copy
description: A Simple and pratical mod that allow you to copy the ID of any item, block and fluid.
body:
# Lice's ID Copy
A versatile utility for modders and builders. Copy IDs of items, fluids, with Ctrl+C, compatible with any mod. Works seamlessly in your inventory and JEI. Upcoming support for Mekanism Chemicals and beyond.
![ID Copied Exemple Gif](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0129ed968082dec729376a63aae0b1d38ea059f4.gif)
It works with or without JEI, however I strongly recommend using it with JEI.

I will make a Fabric version in the future
